claims.claim: started_speaking_at is set when agent's first audio frame is forwarded (_on_first_frame def at 2314, callback added at 2371)
claims.found: 2314 def _on_first_frame(...) sets started_speaking_at = fut.result() or time.time(); 2371 audio_out.first_frame_fut.add_done_callback(_on_first_frame)

claims.claim: Pipecat UserBotLatencyObserver._handle_bot_started_speaking: latency = time.time() - self._user_stopped_time at BotStartedSpeakingFrame
claims.found: 292 if self._user_stopped_time is not None: 293 latency = time.time() - self._user_stopped_time ... on_latency_measured

claims.claim: Pipecat anchors to actual silence = VADUserStoppedSpeakingFrame.timestamp - stop_secs (subtracts VAD hangover)
claims.found: 249 self._user_stopped_time = data.frame.timestamp - data.frame.stop_secs (comment: VAD determination time minus the stop_secs silence duration)

claims.claim: LiveKit uses last_speaking_time (raw VAD stop) as the anchor stopped_speaking_at
claims.found: 1193 stopped_speaking_at = last_speaking_time; _last_speaking_time set on vad.VADEventType.INFERENCE_DONE (line 1061), the earliest speech-end VAD signal, not the turn-decision instant

claims.claim: Deepgram VAQI Latency (L) = elapsed time from UserStoppedSpeaking to AgentStartedSpeaking
claims.found: "Latency (L): elapsed time from UserStoppedSpeaking to AgentStartedSpeaking"
"Retell AI consistently achieves ~800ms response times with interruption handling in production voice agents"

claims.claim: Vapi core metric latency-to-response = duration between user's end of statement and agent's start of statement
claims.found: "Core metric: latency-to-response = duration between user's end of statement and agent's start of statement"

claims.claim: Modal figure of merit = duration from user stops speaking to first hearing the bot
claims.found: "Figure of merit = duration from user stops speaking to first hearing the bot."

claims.claim: Modal: natural v2v latency as short as 100ms; apps target ~1s
claims.found: "Natural conversation v2v latency can be as short as 100ms. Apps target ~1 second or less."

claims.claim: Metric computed as literal subtraction of two boundary timestamps, not a sum of stage estimates (mechanism)
claims.found: Both LiveKit (e2e_latency = started_speaking_at - stopped_speaking_at) and Pipecat (time.time() - _user_stopped_time) compute a direct two-timestamp subtraction; no stage summation.

summary: All 12 checkable assertions verified against ground truth. Every code_ref (LiveKit agent_activity.py:2769, :2314/:2371, audio_recognition.py:1193; otel_metrics.py:23; Pipecat user_bot_latency_observer.py:249 and :292-295) matches the cited line and mechanism. All four source figures (Deepgram VAQI L definition + Retell ~800ms; Vapi latency-to-response; Modal figure-of-merit + 100ms/~1s) are confirmed verbatim. Minor non-defect: 'together-talk' is listed in frontmatter sources but no together-talk figure is cited in the body. PASS.
